summary: The user sought recommendations for TV shows similar to "Stranger Things" and "The Crown," and later requested true crime podcast suggestions akin to "My Favorite Murder." They expressed enjoyment of Netflix originals and asked for a list of shows released in 2022, as well as recommendations for comedies similar to "Brooklyn Nine-Nine" and documentaries like "Tiger King."
